layers.nm: Market Size and Growth Trends: The global renewable energy market is projected to reach $1.5 trillion by 2027. Renewable energy sources accounted for 28% of global electricity generation in 2021, with expectations to rise to 45% by 2030. The market is experiencing robust growth, driven by a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8% globally. Specific market segments show strong growth:Residential sector: Expected CAGR of 10% from 2022 to 2027, driven by rooftop solar adoption. -Commercial and industrial sector: Anticipated CAGR of 12%, fueled by corporate sustainability goals and cost savings. -Utility-scale projects: Projected growth rate of 8%, supported by investments in renewable infrastructure.

s.t: Market Size and Growth Trends:The global renewable energy market is projected to reach $1.5 trillion by 2027.Renewable energy sources accounted for 28% of global electricity generation in 2021, with expectations to rise to 45% by 2030.The market is experiencing robust growth, driven by a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8% globally.Specific market segments show strong growth:- Residential sector: Expected CAGR of 10% from 2022 to 2027, driven by rooftop solar adoption.- Commercial and industrial sector: Anticipated CAGR of 12%, fueled by corporate sustainability goals and cost savings.- Utility-scale projects: Projected growth rate of 8%, supported by investments in renewable infrastructure.
